---
title: "test_aesthetic_steps.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_aesthetic_steps.py"
loc: 83
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.22
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 1.88
overall_score: 3.79
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_rendering_initialization, test_data_pulse.

## Interaction Protocol
Import test_rendering_initialization and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [os](file://os)
- [playwright.async_api](file://playwright.async_api)
- [pytest_bdd](file://pytest_bdd)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `test_rendering_initialization`
- `test_data_pulse`
- `test_iconography`
- `shared_state`
- `check_data_fetched`
- `check_webgl`
- `wait_for_mount`
- `check_geometries`
- `check_bloom`
- `check_pathways`
- `check_render_loop`
- `check_dash_animation`
- `check_pulse_colors`
- `check_agent_nodes`
- `view_matrix`
- `check_sprites`
- `check_pixel_assets`
